Dialog.name: MND_001_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The flowers seem like[n]they're about to wilt...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_002_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}Looks like this spot didn't get any water.[n]Maybe I should water the flowerbed...[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_003_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}I gave the flowers some water...[n]They should be fine for now.[n]{f 1 1}

Dialog.name: MND_004_0_0
Dialog.Page: {f 0 5 254}{f 2 1}The flowers seem to be doing great.[n]{f 1 1}
